# OpenSIN-AI Documentation - Full Context

## Overview
This repository contains the complete documentation for OpenSIN-AI, an enterprise-grade ecosystem for autonomous AI agents. It serves as the Knowledge Layer in the OpenSIN Web Surface Plan.

## Architecture Highlights
- **Engine:** VitePress (Vue-based static site generator)
- **Styling:** Shopify-based Dark-First design (awesome-opensin-design)
- **Deployment:** Automated via Bun and Cloudflare Pages
- **Interoperability:** Native A2A protocol documentation and examples

## Project Structure
- `/docs/guide/`: Primary learning path
- `/docs/api/`: Technical specification of Agent, A2A, and Team APIs
- `/docs/architecture/`: Deep dive into Neural-Bus, Global Brain, and Core Executor
- `/docs/fleet/`: Directory of active A2A Agents
- `/docs/governance/`: Documentation on Zeus (Orchestrator) and Hermes (Messenger)

## Commands
- `bun install`: Install dependencies
- `bun run dev`: Local preview
- `bun ./scripts/build-docs.mjs`: Production build

## Links
- Website: https://opensin.ai
- Docs: https://docs.opensin.ai
- Dashboard: https://chat.opensin.ai
- Marketplace: https://my.opensin.ai
